title: Ivesia sericoleuca
intro: Ivesia sericoleuca, also known as silver Ivesia, is a perennial alpine plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce the risk of infection. Bioactive constituents of Ivesia sericoleuca include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made with Ivesia sericoleuca include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
